http-action.name: /web/config.json

header.name: User-Agent
header.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/137.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

http-action.responseHeaders: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Date: Thu, 05 Jun 2025 05:02:13 GMT Server: nginx/1.27.5 Last-Modified: Wed, 04 Jun 2025 13:57:49 GMT ETag: W/"684050dd-6cf" Content-Encoding: br Vary: Origin X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 aa27a00d18f5fd7fe6d6c8f067b321d6.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: SIN2-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: Xk-ykLNP8NzQA-rUN9ntoo-JxYX3le3TEVZqLQGSulJ3Jwj32J2kwA== X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self' blob: 'unsafe-inline' cdn.jsdelivr.net fonts.googleapis.com fonts.gstatic.com assets.dcube.cloud www.onemap.gov.sg sst-s3-sla-dcp-uatez-docs-scan-stg-01.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com app.singpass.gov.sg api.qrserver.com; img-src 'self' data: api.qrserver.com; X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload X-SLA-DCP: Govtech2024 Vary: Origin
